title: lithocarpus bicoloratus
intro: Lithocarpus bicoloratus, also known as the Taiwan Lithocarpus, is a type of deciduous tree native to Taiwan and China, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus bicoloratus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve steaming the leaves or bark to make a tea or infusing them in hot water to create a medicinal infusion.
